# mvpd: An R Package for Multivariate Product Distributions

- `[dpr]mvss`: multivariate subgaussian stable distributions
- `[pr]mvlogis`: multivariate logistic distributions

The goal of `mvpd` is to use product distribution theory to allow the
numerical calculations of specific scale mixtures of the multivariate
normal distribution. The multivariate subgaussian stable distribution is
the product of the square root of a univariate positive stable
distribution and the multivariate normal distribution (see Nolan
(2013)).

## Example

Generate 1000 draws from a random bivariate subgaussian stable
distribution with alpha=1.71 and plot.

``` r
library(mvpd)
set.seed(2)
## basic example code
biv <- rmvss(n=1e3, alpha=1.71, Q=matrix(c(10,7.5,7.5,10),2))
head(biv)
#>             [,1]      [,2]
#> [1,]  3.17465324  4.122869
#> [2,] -3.26707008 -1.366920
#> [3,] -5.82800100  1.831774
#> [4,] -2.02463359 -3.749701
#> [5,]  0.01294963  3.042960
#> [6,]  1.73029594  3.812420
plot(biv); abline(h=0,v=0)
```

![](reference/figures/README-example-1.png)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`adaptIntegrate_inf_limPD()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/adaptIntegrate_inf_limPD.md)
  : Adaptive multivariate integration over hypercubes (admitting
  infinite limits)
- [`dkolm()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/dkolm.md) :
  Density for the Kolmogorov Distribution
- [`dmvss()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/dmvss.md) :
  Multivariate Subgaussian Stable Density
- [`dmvss_mat()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/dmvss_mat.md)
  : Multivariate Subgaussian Stable Density for matrix inputs
- [`dmvt_mat()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/dmvt_mat.md) :
  Multivariate t-Distribution Density for matrix inputs
- [`fit_mvss()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/fit_mvss.md) :
  Fit a Multivariate Subgaussian Distribution
- [`mvpd`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/mvpd.md)
  [`mvpd-package`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/mvpd.md) :
  Multivariate Product Distributions
- [`pmvlogis()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/pmvlogis.md) :
  Multivariate Elliptically Contoured Logistic Distribution
- [`pmvss()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/pmvss.md) :
  Multivariate Subgaussian Stable Distribution
- [`pmvss_mc()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/pmvss_mc.md) :
  Monte Carlo Multivariate Subgaussian Stable Distribution
- [`rkolm()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/rkolm.md) :
  Random Variates for the Kolmogorov Distribution
- [`rmvlogis()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/rmvlogis.md) :
  Multivariate Logistic Random Variables
- [`rmvss()`](https://swihart.github.io/mvpd/reference/rmvss.md) :
  Multivariate Subgaussian Stable Random Variates
